creator: rsmith@xs4all.nl
text:
Some ports (e.g. audacious-plugins) don't work with the FLAC library
	version 1.1.2 current in ports. First step in fixing this is to
	update the port. See included shar file.

Fix: Here is the updated port in a shar archive:

------------------- shar archive of audio/flac 1.1.4 -------------------


------------------- shar archive of audio/flac 1.1.4 ---------------------fZPq1BKqDFvOIH0qFKL2ftqy7LLyqWd0G8DXOBnrDbn2SpGE
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.shar"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.shar"

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	flac/
#	flac/files
#	flac/files/patch-doc_html_images_Makefile.in
#	flac/files/patch-doc_Makefile.in
#	flac/files/patch-doc_html_Makefile.in
#	flac/files/patch-Makefile.in
#	flac/files/patch-doc_html_ru_Makefile.in
#	flac/files/patch-man_flac.1
#	flac/files/patch-doc_html_images_hw_Makefile.in
#	flac/Makefile
#	flac/distinfo
#	flac/pkg-descr
#	flac/pkg-plist
#
echo c - flac/
mkdir -p flac/ > /dev/null 2>&1
echo c - flac/files
mkdir -p flac/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - flac/files/patch-doc_html_images_Makefile.in
sed 's/^X//' >flac/files/patch-doc_html_images_Makefile.in << 'END-of-flac/files/patch-doc_html_images_Makefile.in'
X--- doc/html/images/Makefile.in.orig	Tue Mar  6 11:47:24 2007
X+++ doc/html/images/Makefile.in	Tue Mar  6 11:47:40 2007
X@@ -220,7 +220,7 @@
X 
X SUBDIRS = hw
X 
X-docdir = $(datadir)/doc/$(PACKAGE)-$(VERSION)/html/images
X+docdir = $(datadir)/doc/$(PACKAGE)/html/images
X 
X doc_DATA = \
X 	1x1.gif \
END-of-flac/files/patch-doc_html_images_Makefile.in
echo x - flac/files/patch-doc_Makefile.in
sed 's/^X//' >flac/files/patch-doc_Makefile.in << 'END-of-flac/files/patch-doc_Makefile.in'
X--- doc/Makefile.in.orig	Tue Mar  6 11:27:41 2007
X+++ doc/Makefile.in	Tue Mar  6 11:28:29 2007
X@@ -220,7 +220,7 @@
X 
X SUBDIRS = . html
X 
X-docdir = $(datadir)/doc/$(PACKAGE)-$(VERSION)
X+docdir = $(datadir)/doc/$(PACKAGE)
X 
X doc_DATA = \
X 	FLAC.tag
END-of-flac/files/patch-doc_Makefile.in
echo x - flac/files/patch-doc_html_Makefile.in
sed 's/^X//' >flac/files/patch-doc_html_Makefile.in << 'END-of-flac/files/patch-doc_html_Makefile.in'
X--- doc/html/Makefile.in.orig	Tue Mar  6 11:41:53 2007
X+++ doc/html/Makefile.in	Tue Mar  6 11:45:34 2007
X@@ -220,7 +220,7 @@
X 
X SUBDIRS = ru images
X 
X-docdir = $(datadir)/doc/$(PACKAGE)-$(VERSION)/html
X+docdir = $(datadir)/doc/$(PACKAGE)/html
X 
X doc_DATA = \
X 	changelog.html \
END-of-flac/files/patch-doc_html_Makefile.in
echo x - flac/files/patch-Makefile.in
sed 's/^X//' >flac/files/patch-Makefile.in << 'END-of-flac/files/patch-Makefile.in'
X--- Makefile.in.orig	Tue Mar  6 11:59:11 2007
X+++ Makefile.in	Tue Mar  6 11:59:27 2007
X@@ -231,7 +231,7 @@
X 
X AUTOMAKE_OPTIONS = foreign 1.7
X 
X-SUBDIRS = doc include m4 man src test build flac.pbproj obj
X+SUBDIRS = doc include m4 man src test build flac.pbproj
X 
X DISTCLEANFILES = libtool-disable-static
X 
END-of-flac/files/patch-Makefile.in
echo x - flac/files/patch-doc_html_ru_Makefile.in
sed 's/^X//' >flac/files/patch-doc_html_ru_Makefile.in << 'END-of-flac/files/patch-doc_html_ru_Makefile.in'
X--- doc/html/ru/Makefile.in.orig	Tue Mar  6 11:50:52 2007
X+++ doc/html/ru/Makefile.in	Tue Mar  6 11:51:10 2007
X@@ -218,7 +218,7 @@
X 
X AUTOMAKE_OPTIONS = foreign
X 
X-docdir = $(datadir)/doc/$(PACKAGE)-$(VERSION)/html/ru
X+docdir = $(datadir)/doc/$(PACKAGE)/html/ru
X 
X doc_DATA = \
X 	authors.html \
END-of-flac/files/patch-doc_html_ru_Makefile.in
echo x - flac/files/patch-man_flac.1
sed 's/^X//' >flac/files/patch-man_flac.1 << 'END-of-flac/files/patch-man_flac.1'
X--- man/flac.1.orig	Tue Mar  6 11:52:33 2007
X+++ man/flac.1	Tue Mar  6 11:53:46 2007
X@@ -319,7 +319,7 @@
X .PP
X metaflac(1).
X .PP
X-The programs are documented fully by HTML format documentation, available in \fI/usr/share/doc/flac/html\fR on Debian GNU/Linux systems.
X+The programs are documented fully by HTML format documentation, available in \f%%PREFIX%%/share/doc/flac/html\fR.
X .SH "AUTHOR"
X .PP
X This manual page was written by Matt Zimmerman <mdz@debian.org> for the Debian GNU/Linux system (but may be used by others).
END-of-flac/files/patch-man_flac.1
echo x - flac/files/patch-doc_html_images_hw_Makefile.in
sed 's/^X//' >flac/files/patch-doc_html_images_hw_Makefile.in << 'END-of-flac/files/patch-doc_html_images_hw_Makefile.in'
X--- doc/html/images/hw/Makefile.in.orig	Tue Mar  6 12:13:51 2007
X+++ doc/html/images/hw/Makefile.in	Tue Mar  6 12:14:06 2007
X@@ -218,7 +218,7 @@
X 
X AUTOMAKE_OPTIONS = foreign
X 
X-docdir = $(datadir)/doc/$(PACKAGE)-$(VERSION)/html/images/hw
X+docdir = $(datadir)/doc/$(PACKAGE)/html/images/hw
X 
X doc_DATA = \
X 	Blackbird_Front_low3_325x87.jpg \
END-of-flac/files/patch-doc_html_images_hw_Makefile.in
echo x - flac/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >flac/Makefile << 'END-of-flac/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	flac
X# Date created:		Mar 18, 2001
X# Whom:			Ying-Chieh Liao <ijliao@FreeBSD.org>
X#
X# $FreeBSD: ports/audio/flac/Makefile,v 1.39 2007/02/01 02:41:17 kris Exp $
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	flac
XPORTVERSION=	1.1.4
XCATEGORIES=	audio
XMASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}
X
XMAINTAINER=	naddy@FreeBSD.org
XCOMMENT=	Free lossless audio codec
X
XLIB_DEPENDS=	ogg.5:${PORTSDIR}/audio/libogg
X
XUSE_AUTOTOOLS=	libtool:15
XUSE_ICONV=	yes
XGNU_CONFIGURE=  yes
XCONFIGURE_TARGET=	--target=${ARCH}-unknown-freebsd${OSREL}
XCONFIGURE_ARGS=	--enable-sse \
X		--with-libiconv-prefix="${LOCALBASE}" \
X		--with-ogg="${LOCALBASE}"
XCONFIGURE_ENV=	CPPFLAGS="-I${WRKSRC}/include" \
X		ac_cv_path_XMMS_CONFIG=no
X
X.if defined(NOPORTDOCS)
XMAKE_ENV=	DOC=""
X.else
XMAKE_ENV=	DOC=doc
X.endif
X
XINSTALLS_SHLIB=	yes
XMAN1=		flac.1 metaflac.1
X
X.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
X
X.if ${ARCH} == "i386"
XBUILD_DEPENDS=	nasm:${PORTSDIR}/devel/nasm
X.endif
X
X# "obj" is magic to our make(1)
Xpost-configure:
X	@${RM} -rf ${WRKSRC}/obj
X
Xpost-build:
X	${REINPLACE_CMD} 's:%%PREFIX%%:${PREFIX}:' ${WRKSRC}/man/flac.1
X
Xtest: build
X	@cd ${WRKSRC}; ${MAKE} check
X
X.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
END-of-flac/Makefile
echo x - flac/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >flac/distinfo << 'END-of-flac/distinfo'
XMD5 (flac-1.1.4.tar.gz) = 3958cbd5b6ed8c14966792538e44223b
XSHA256 (flac-1.1.4.tar.gz) = b774d573b971f71f84386d34b96d388dd2dae3f15735acf91dbd4adff0ce4114
XSIZE (flac-1.1.4.tar.gz) = 1866308
END-of-flac/distinfo
echo x - flac/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >flac/pkg-descr << 'END-of-flac/pkg-descr'
XFLAC is an Open Source lossless audio codec.
X
XFLAC is comprised of
X* libFLAC, a library which implements reference encoders and
X  decoders, and a metadata interface
X* libFLAC++, a C++ object wrapper library around libFLAC
X* flac, a command-line program for encoding and decoding files
X* metaflac, a command-line program for viewing and editing FLAC
X  metadata
X* user and API documentation
X
XWWW: http://flac.sourceforge.net/
END-of-flac/pkg-descr
echo x - flac/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >flac/pkg-plist << 'END-of-flac/pkg-plist'
